name: dev-utils
title: Dev Utils
description: A collection of everyday developer utilities — JSON, Base64, UUID, Timestamp, URL, Color, and more
author: iptodays

commands.name: json-tool
commands.title: JSON Tool
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils
commands.description: Format, validate, minify, and escape JSON strings

commands.title: Base64 Tool
commands.subtitle: Dev Utils
commands.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings
